visa_types.name: Long Term Immigration Visa
visa_types.visa_fees:
Kindly click here (https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/HtmlPage/Html/View?id=956&lang=Eng) to know if you require a visa to enter Georgia.
The applicable visa fee in LKR is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
The Visa fee is non-refundable.

[Table:  Long Term Immigration Visa]

              Additional Optional Services:

[Table:  Long Term Immigration Visa]

[Table:  Long Term Immigration Visa]

For Applicants applying from Sri Lanka
- The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by cash in Sri Lankan Rupees (LKR).
- It is subject to change every month end.
- The visa fee is non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of LKR 20,040/-
- The applicable visa fee is in LKR
visa_types.processing_time:
The processing time for any short term application at the Embassy of Georgia is  10 working days
The processing time for Student application at the Embassy of  Georgia is 2 months
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned estimated processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Depending on the  purpose of your travel to Georgia, there are different categories of visas that  will apply to the occasion. Whether you are planning to go on a visit, study or  work and reside there permanently, you will have to apply for a different  Georgian Visa, accordingly. Depending on the purpose of travelling you may be  granted a visa with the right of stay for a short-term period, long-term period  or with the right for transiting the territory of Georgia. The authorized body  for issuing, extending, and terminating Georgian visas is Ministry of Foreign  Affairs of Georgia/Embassy of Georgia in India. 
Shor-term visa may be  issued according to the number of days indicated in a visa application but for  not more than 30 calendar days. And only if you have visited Georgia at least  once during the previous year, and there are grounds for requesting short-term  visa you may be granted with a short-term multiple-entry visa for a maximum of  five years. Besides, the total period of an alien’s entry and stay in Georgia  in any 180-day period shall not exceed 90 calendar days.
Long-term visa may be  issued with the right of multiple entries to Georgia for 90 calendar days or one  year period of validity and stay.
Please note that all  documents required for visa should be submitted through the VFS Global  representation. Please visit the official  website of Consular Department of MFA Georgia to  find detailed information regarding to the visa procedures. 
https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/HtmlPage/Html/View?id=956andlang=Eng (https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/HtmlPage/Html/View?id=956&lang=Eng)
Note: Once the application is submitted in VFS Centre and payment receipt is  generated, applicant needs to upload scanned payment receipt in Georgia online  portal and updated application form needs to be submitted in VFS center.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Depending on the  purpose of your travel to Georgia, there are different categories of visas that  will apply to the occasion. Whether you are planning to go on a visit, study or  work and reside there permanently, you will have to apply for a different  Georgian Visa, accordingly. Depending on the purpose of travelling you may be  granted a visa with the right of stay for a short-term period, long-term period  or with the right for transiting the territory of Georgia. The authorized body  for issuing, extending, and terminating Georgian visas is Ministry of Foreign  Affairs of Georgia/Embassy of Georgia in India. 
Shor-term visa may be  issued according to the number of days indicated in a visa application but for  not more than 30 calendar days. And only if you have visited Georgia at least  once during the previous year, and there are grounds for requesting short-term  visa you may be granted with a short-term multiple-entry visa for a maximum of  five years. Besides, the total period of an alien’s entry and stay in Georgia  in any 180-day period shall not exceed 90 calendar days.
Long-term visa may be  issued with the right of multiple entries to Georgia for 90 calendar days or one  year period of validity and stay.
Please note that all  documents required for visa should be submitted through the VFS Global  representation. Please visit the official  website of Consular Department of MFA Georgia to  find detailed information regarding to the visa procedures. 
https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/HtmlPage/Html/View?id=956andlang=Eng (https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/HtmlPage/Html/View?id=956&lang=Eng)
Note: Once the application is submitted in VFS Centre and payment receipt is  generated, applicant needs to upload scanned payment receipt in Georgia online  portal and updated application form needs to be submitted in VFS center.

## Visa Fees
Kindly click here (https://www.geoconsul.gov.ge/HtmlPage/Html/View?id=956&lang=Eng) to know if you require a visa to enter Georgia.
The applicable visa fee in LKR is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
The Visa fee is non-refundable.

[Table:  Long Term Immigration Visa]

              Additional Optional Services:

[Table:  Long Term Immigration Visa]

[Table:  Long Term Immigration Visa]

For Applicants applying from Sri Lanka
- The only acceptable method of payment for Visa Fees is by cash in Sri Lankan Rupees (LKR).
- It is subject to change every month end.
- The visa fee is non-refundable.
- There is a service charge of LKR 20,040/-
- The applicable visa fee is in LKR

## Documents Required

## 
Please click here for Documents required for Work Visa (D1 category)
Please click here for Documents required for Interns and Mass Media (D2 category)
Please click here for Documents required for Student Visa (D3 category)
Please click here for Documents required for Family Reunion Visa (D4 category)

Please click here for Documents required for Individuals who have right of owning property in Georgia (D5 category)
Note: For documents, an applicant needs to submit one set of hard copies and it is mandatory to upload scanned documents as per above checklist after filling online application form. Kindly carry your original supporting documents required only for verification.
In case the applicant is being invited by a person residing in  Georgia, invitation letter needs to be filled by the invitee and notarized copy  needs to be enclosed in the application. Click here for invitation letter

## Photo Specifications
A digital copy of photograph with below specification needs to be uploaded when filling up online application form. To fill Online application form kindly click here (#).
A recent digital colour photograph (digital photo 472 x 610 pixels in dimension; scanned photo – 4 x 5.16 cm in size, scanned at 300 DPI resolutions)

## Processing Time
The processing time for any short term application at the Embassy of Georgia is  10 working days
The processing time for Student application at the Embassy of  Georgia is 2 months
Please be advised that due to the above mentioned estimated processing time, we are not able to guarantee the return of passports by specific dates for travel.
Please be sure to submit your visa application well in advance, to avoid any inconveniences

## Online application Form
Kindly click here (https://geoconsul.gov.ge/en/home) to fill online e-application form.
Please note that it is mandatory to upload all scanned supporting documents as specified in the checklist.
